name: tsc-on-edit
description: Run tsc --noEmit after editing TypeScript files

hooks.command: bash -c 'out=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); code=$?; [ $code -ne 0 ] && { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0'
bash -c 'out=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); code=$?; [ $code -ne 0 ] && { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0'
bash -c 'out=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); code=$?; [ $code -ne 0 ] && { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0'

name: npm-lint-on-edit
description: Run npm run lint after editing files

hooks.command: bash -c 'out=$(npm run lint 2>&1); code=$?; [ $code -ne 0 ] && { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0'
bash -c 'out=$(npm run lint 2>&1); code=$?; [ $code -ne 0 ] && { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0'
bash -c 'out=$(npm run lint 2>&1); code=$?; [ $code -ne 0 ] && { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0'

name: eslint-on-edit
description: Run ESLint --fix after editing JS/TS files

hooks.command: bash -c 'file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE_PATH"; out=$(npx eslint --fix "$file" 2>&1); code=$?; [ $code -ne 0 ] && { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0'
bash -c 'file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE_PATH"; out=$(npx eslint --fix "$file" 2>&1); code=$?; [ $code -ne 0 ] && { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0'
bash -c 'file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE_PATH"; out=$(npx eslint --fix "$file" 2>&1); code=$?; [ $code -ne 0 ] && { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0'

name: prettier-on-edit
description: Run Prettier after editing JS/TS/CSS/JSON files

hooks.command: bash -c 'file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE_PATH"; out=$(npx prettier --write "$file" 2>&1); code=$?; [ $code -ne 0 ] && { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0'
bash -c 'file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE_PATH"; out=$(npx prettier --write "$file" 2>&1); code=$?; [ $code -ne 0 ] && { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0'
bash -c 'file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE_PATH"; out=$(npx prettier --write "$file" 2>&1); code=$?; [ $code -ne 0 ] && { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0'

name: desktop-notifications
description: Send desktop notifications when Claude Code finishes working or needs user input. Works on macOS and Linux systems.

hooks.command: if command -v osascript >/dev/null 2>&1; then osascript -e 'display notification "Claude has finished working" with title "Claude Code"'; elif command -v notify-send >/dev/null 2>&1; then notify-send 'Claude Code' "Claude has finished working"; fi

if command -v osascript >/dev/null 2>&1; then osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs your input" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Ping"'; elif command -v notify-send >/dev/null 2>&1; then notify-send -u critical 'Claude Code' "Claude needs your input"; fi
